docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,142.00 FILED BY BEGAZO, ALVARO AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. CURRENT RESIDENT STATED THE SUBJECT NEVER LIVED THERE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEGAZO, ALVARO AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-17-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED FEB-02-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEGAZO, ALVARO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE $3,142.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,272.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
